message:
🐛 Add Resource Marshall to deploy dashboard default cards

Resource Marshall card was missing from DEFAULT_DEPLOY_CARDS in
Deploy.tsx, so it would not appear when the deploy dashboard was
reset. Added it alongside the existing cross-card deploy section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
